title: Stale Virtual Environment Interpreter
symptoms: bad interpreter: No such file or directory
root_cause: Virtual environment executable referenced outdated python interpreter path after environment relocation.
reproduction_steps: Move or recreate virtual environment improperly
Attempt to execute stale wrapper executable
resolution_steps: Recreate venv using python3 -m venv venv
prevention: Environment validator should verify executable shebang integrity before execution.
related_logs: bad interpreter: No such file or directory
